welcome.subtitle.en: Let's get your Cardinal Media Server set up.

server-name.p1.en: Your server's name will be seen by the people you share it with.

usage-data.message-p1.en: You can allow Cardinal Apps Inc. to collect anonymous data about how your apps are used. Read more .

usage-data.message-p2.en: Cardinal Apps Inc. adheres to a strict Privacy Policy that protects your data.

privacy.message-p1.en: By continuing, you are stating that you have read and understand the Terms & Conditions and the Privacy Policy .

login.overview.en:
Cardinal accounts are free to create, and using one will allow you to use Cardinal's cloud services in your apps. You can claim this Media Server at any time by logging in with your cloud account.

You can skip this and sign in later. Read more about how accounts work.

login.logged-in-as.en: This server will be claimed by {name} when setup is complete

login.no-public-name-set.en: a Cardinal user that has not set a public name

help.message-p1.en: You are invited to join the Community Forums , a place where you can have open discussions with other Cardinal users.

help.message-p2.en: Official docs, tutorials, guides, and FAQ are available on the help site .

finish.message-p1.en: Enjoy the apps. Your feedback is appreciated.
